title: cota altissima
intro: Cota altissima, also known as Knapweed or Yellow Knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, leading to several health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health and reduced inflammation. Cota altissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and digestive disorders.
